title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0082 Bull Inn, 333 Crews Hole Road, Bristol, BS5 8BQ
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Wellington Pub Company  Site address:  Bull Inn, 333 Crews Hole Road, Bristol, BS5 8BQ  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of existing building and erection of a new block of apartment comprising 9 dwellings (6 x 2 bedroom flats and 3 x 1 bedroom flats) together with the addition of PV panels and airsource heat pumps  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 10 March 2025   Date by when representations must be made 17 April 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 6 May 2025   Decision date 6 May 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of reasons  (PDF, 161 KB, 12 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 17 April 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0082 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form completed  (PDF, 6.42 MB, 14 pages)  Bull Inn-C-001-P03- Drainage Strategy  (PDF, 2.26 MB, 1 page)  Bull Planning, Design and Access Statement  (PDF, 263 KB, 12 pages)  CIL form  (PDF, 2.51 MB, 6 pages)  CMRA complete  (PDF, 13.3 MB, 51 pages)  Ecodan Air Source Heat Pump Data Sheet  (PDF, 531 KB, 2 pages)  Heritage Assessment  (PDF, 18.1 MB, 76 pages)  Qcells Data sheet Q.TRON BLK S-G3R.12+-BFG 435-445 2024-05 Rev01 EN  (PDF, 336 KB, 2 pages)  The Bull Energy Assessment 241217  (PDF, 5.15 MB, 9 pages)  The Bull Inn - Drianage Strategy & Maintenance Report - V3  (PDF, 6.8...
